form:Form.name: NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Evaluacion.REPORTE-FILTRO2.form

form:VGroup.label: Criterios de selección de parámetros para el Proceso
form:VGroup.name: vgroupDatosCustom

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM EDD03_EVALUACION, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, ORG03_EMPRESAS JOIN EDD03_EVALUACION.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa INNER ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa WHERE 1=1 {%?(#SOURCE:@ESTADO!='') {% and EDD03_EVALUACION.c_estado= {#SOURCE:@ESTADO} %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@empresa!='') {% and ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@empresa} %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@activos='1') {% and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_indic_activo= \'1\' %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@SUPERVISOR!='') {% AND EDD03_EVALUACION.oi_supervisor in (SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal = {%=#SOURCE:@SUPERVISOR%}) %} {% %} %} {%?(#SOURCE:@EVALUADOR!='') {% AND EDD03_EVALUACION.oi_evaluador in (SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal = {%=#SOURCE:@EVALUADOR%}) %} {% %} %} ORDER BY d_empresa ASC, e_numero_legajo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW
